name: Radio
description: Radio (base control, ring+inset-box unchecked / ring+dot checked), RadioLabel (labeled composition with optional badge/sublabel/description/link), and RadioCard (selectable bordered card with a generic leading-visual slot).
sourceNote: Mirrors the Checkbox/CheckboxLabel/CheckboxCard architecture exactly (same decorative-render-mode fix for nesting inside RadioCard's own button, same generic leading slot simplifying Figma's 6 rigid RadioCard types). Figma's 'Focused' variant recolors the ring to primary-base/primary-darkest depending on checked state — mapped to the standard :focus-visible pseudo-class instead of a separate outline, for consistency with Checkbox.
